item.title: New NASA Earth Missions Gear Up to Start Science Flights - NASA Science
item.description: The first of six new airborne campaigns will hit the skies this summer.

item.title: At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI
item.description: From open models to real-time simulation, AI and graphics breakthroughs are transforming media, content creation and robotics.

item.title: Integrate NVIDIA Omniverse RTX Sensor Simulation Into Existing Apps | NVIDIA Technical Blog
item.description: Developers building 3D, design, simulation, robotics, and industrial digital twin applications need ways to bring physical AI capabilities into the tools and services they already use.

item.title: NASA’s Psyche Mission Delivers Mars Flyby Data, Time-lapse Video - NASA Science
item.description: When NASA’s Psyche spacecraft flew by Mars for a gravity assist on May 15, 2026, it gave the mission team an opportunity to test instruments and prep for science they’ll conduct when reaching the metal-rich asteroid Psyche in 2029, and collect images and a time-lapse video of the Mars encounter.

item.title: NovoTags: AI-designed proteins help scientists see inside living cells | EMBL
item.description: Researchers have designed synthetic and inducible proteins that bind to bright fluorescent dyes with high specificity and affinity, significantly expanding the toolkit for multicolour imaging of proteins inside cells

item.title: Q&A: How Capcom Brought Path Tracing to RE ENGINE Across PRAGMATA and Resident Evil Requiem | NVIDIA Technical Blog
item.description: Capcom’s RE ENGINE team set out to bring path tracing into two shipping titles at once, Resident Evil Requiem and PRAGMATA, each with a different visual identity. Over two years, the RE ENGINE team…

item.title: Build a Multi-Camera 3D Tracking Application with NVIDIA DeepStream 9.1 Skills | NVIDIA Technical Blog
item.description: Developers building video analytics applications across large spaces must track the same object as it moves between camera views. Single-camera 2D tracking lacks reliable depth information and…

item.title: NVIDIA and Japan Bring Full-Stack AI and Robotics to Every Industry
item.description: NVIDIA and its partners in Japan are this week showcasing the AI ecosystem's latest advancements. Check back here for updates.

item.title: How to Run an Autoresearch Workflow with RL Agent Skills and NVIDIA NeMo | NVIDIA Technical Blog
item.description: Coding AI agents are becoming practical operators for long-running machine learning (ML) workflows. They can inspect repositories, set up runtimes, resolve build issues, launch experiments…

item.title: AI in Indian Education: Atal Innovation Mission and Google launch ATL Saathi
item.description: Atal Innovation Mission launches ATL Saathi, a Gemini powered AI assistant empowering India's educators to nurture the next generation of innovators.

item.title: GeForce NOW Turns Up the Heat With New GeForce RTX 5080-Powered Toronto Server
item.description: Plus, tap into ‘NTE: Neverness to Everness’ with a new update, alongside three new games joining the cloud this week.

item.title: Create a LangChain Deep Agents Harness Profile for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra to Improve Performance | NVIDIA Technical Blog
item.description: Agentic systems often face a trade-off between accuracy and cost. The highest-performing proprietary frontier models and harnesses provide top accuracy but are expensive. Fine-tuning offers one way to…

item.title: NVIDIA Nemotron Achieves Benchmark-Leading Performance With LangChain Deep Agents Harness
item.description: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is offering leading performance at lower cost than top closed models with the largest and most widely adopted AI agent orchestration platform. LangChain tuned its Deep Agents harness for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, achieving the highest accuracy among open models, while completing more tasks at higher throughput and running at 10x […]

item.title: SkillOpt turns AI agent skills into trainable assets
item.description: AI agents often fail because their instructions, or skills, are manually modified with no guarantee of improvement. Learn how SkillOpt turns skill editing into a training process, making agent behavior more reliable without changing model weights:

item.title: Partners, NASA Ready for June Launch of Swift Boost Mission - NASA Science
item.description: A mission to raise the orbit of NASA’s Swift observatory is poised for launch June 30.

item.title: EasyGrid: towards better automation in cryo-electron microscopy | EMBL
item.description: EMBL Grenoble scientists have developed EasyGrid and EasyGrid Control, unique instruments that automate advanced microscopy sample preparation and quality control

item.title: Call for proposals for innovations across the Global South now open - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: We are launching an Innovation Challenge call to support bold, locally led solutions that strengthen resilience, protect ecosystems, and create sustainable opportunities for communities.

item.title: How AI is changing the nature of mathematical research
item.description: What machine learning theorists learned using AI agents to generate proofs — and what comes next.

item.title: No Plugins, No Problem: Integrating TAK, Meshtastic, and iOS | Meshtastic
item.description: Announcing native TAK Server integration in the Meshtastic iOS app, bridging mesh networking with situational awareness tools.

item.title: How to watch the 'Masters of the Universe' movie, streaming on Prime Video starting July 22
item.description: The live-action film adaptation of the classic 1980s toy brand stars Nicholas Galitzine as Prince Adam/He-Man.

item.title: SIMA 2: A Gemini-Powered AI Agent for 3D Virtual Worlds
item.description: Introducing SIMA 2, the next milestone in our research creating general and helpful AI agents. By integrating the advanced capabilities of our Gemini models, SIMA is evolving from an instruction-follower into an interactive gaming companion.

item.title: ...That one time at DEF CON! | Meshtastic
item.description: A recap of the Meshtastic DEF CON deployment, including a vulnerability demonstration and the project's response.

item.title: Meshtastic 2.7 Preview: UI Overhaul - Introducing BaseUI! + New Input Support + TFT Unification | Meshtastic
item.description: Meshtastic 2.7 is here with a complete redesign of the standard UI, Introducing BaseUI! New input support on native linux, and the ability to switch between UIs on supported hardware.

item.description: Today we are announcing a commercial agreement with Catalyst Brands to deploy Figure humanoids into their distribution and logistics network.

item.title: Helix 02 Bedroom Tidy
item.description: Two Helix 02-equipped humanoids reset a bedroom in under two minutes, opening doors, hanging clothes, putting away headphones, closing a book, taking out trash, pushing a chair under a desk, and working together to make a bed.

item.title: This could be the largest synthetic code dataset yet

item.title: How training environments can teach AI models to misbehave
item.description: A new study presented at ICML showed that language models trained with reinforcement learning can find and exploit loopholes to maximize reward — at a cost.

item.title: Quantinuum accelerates the path to Universal Fully Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computing; supports Microsoft’s AI and quantum-powered compute platform and “the path to a Quantum Supercomputer”
item.description: Quantinuum will achieve universal fault-tolerant quantum computing, built on foundations such as a universal fault-tolerant gate set, high fidelity physical qubits uniquely capable of supporting reliable logical qubits, and a fully-scalable architecture

item.title: June 2026 Company Update
item.description: June brought continued momentum across the Terran R program, with major milestones across first stage qualification, second stage transport, and launch site readiness. Design In June, the team released 2,238 flight parts. Engineers remain focused on the first stage, releasing nearly all component

item.title: May 2026 Company Update
item.description: May brought a major milestone for the Terran R program, with the integrated second stage departing Long Beach and beginning its journey to NASA Stennis. Across the company, teams continued advancing work across design, build, test, and launch. Design This month, 1,455 flight parts were released,

item.title: April 2026 Company Update

item.title: March 2026 Company Update
item.description: March brought continued progress across the Terran R program, with key milestones across design, manufacturing, testing, and launch preparations.  Design This month, the team released 2,207 flight parts, with a continued focus on completing the stage one shipping assembly. item.title: Road to VR
item.description: AR unicorn Magic Leap is again pivoting its core business, this time to serve as a waveguide supplier to other companies making AR glasses, something that we’ve learned comes amid a mass lay off nearly 200 of its core engineering and product development staff. item.description: Kiosks are appearing in store after store, and smartphone apps have become more familiar than face-to-face service. As digital technology weaves its way into every corner of daily life, living has grown more convenient — yet it is also an

item.title: Materials Research Society
item.description:
Founded in 1973, the Materials Research Society (MRS) is a global, member-driven organization and a recognized leader in the advancement of interdisciplinary materials research. With Membership spanning academia, industry, and government and hailing from 90+ countries, MRS fosters collaboration across physics, chemistry, biology, engineering, and beyond.
MRS brings a broad range of Members, from students to Nobel Laureates, together to exchange ideas and drive innovation. Nearly half of MRS Members—and many authors, attendees, and visitors—come from outside the U.S., reflecting the society’s global reach.
Through world-renowned Meetings, peer-reviewed journals, webinars, workshops, advocacy, volunteer opportunities, career development, worldwide collaborations, and more, MRS is committed

item.title: The hidden environmental cost of your jeans – and what’s being done about it
item.description: Supermodel and UNEP Goodwill Ambassador Amber Valletta travels to Tunisia, where denim manufacturers are striving to lighten their environmental footprint.

item.title: Restoring salmon, the “king of fish”, to Canada’s rivers and creeks
item.description: Atlantic salmon are returning to Canada’s rivers thanks to an Indigenous-led restoration effort that is reviving ecosystems, cultural traditions and endangered fish populations.

item.title: Madden NFL 27 Arcade Edition brings gridiron action to Apple Arcade on August 6
item.description: Apple Arcade grows its roster of hit sports games with the addition of EA SPORTS Madden NFL 27 and more coming in August.

item.title: Apple unveils innovative features and intelligence experiences across services
item.description: With the 2027 software releases coming this fall, Apple is bringing powerful new features to services users.

item.title: Apple aids app development with new intelligence frameworks and advanced tools
item.description: Apple today introduced new intelligence capabilities, expanded productivity features in Xcode, and platform improvements.

item.title: Apple unveils next generation of Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, and more
item.description: Today, Apple previewed its upcoming software releases that will deliver the next generation of Apple Intelligence and introduce Siri AI.

item.title: Event Recap | Verified Video: Authenticity from Capture to Playback
item.description: We hosted a conversation on how Content Credentials are making end-to-end provenance for video workflows a reality.

item.title: Your work, your proof: Safe Creative and the future of copyright registration
item.description: Learn about how Safe Creative protects creators against content theft, and how they are implementing Content Credentials for transparency in IP registration.

item.title: How Forensic Photonics verifies digital evidence with Content Credentials
item.description: In high-stakes court proceedings, digital evidence has to be trustworthy. Learn how Forensic Photonics' LIFT device adds C2PA metadata to fingerprint images.

item.title: Event Recap | Proof of Personhood: Provenance and AI Avatars
item.description: We recently hosted a conversation on the opportunities and challenges of AI avatars. Check out the highlights.

item.title: Researchers head to Greenland for ambitious science mission - British Antarctic Survey
item.description: An international team is collecting observations to understand how a melting Greenland could cause weather change in UK and Europe.

item.title: Rothera Research Station's construction season upgrades safeguard future polar science - British Antarctic Survey
item.description: A significant phase of construction at Rothera has been completed this season, delivering new infrastructure that will power cutting-edge polar science for decades ahead.

item.title: New study provides clues to predicting iceberg calving - British Antarctic Survey
item.description: New research led by British Antarctic Survey provides fresh insights into how cracks and fractures develop in ice and how future sea-level rise may unfold.
